units.title: Limits and Continuity
units.description: Intuitive limits; one-sided limits; continuity; the epsilon-delta definition

units.title: Derivatives: Rules and Applications
units.description: Power rule, product rule, chain rule; optimization and related rates

units.title: Integration: Antiderivatives and Area
units.description: Fundamental theorem of calculus; definite integrals; area between curves

units.title: Vectors and Matrices
units.description: 2D and 3D vectors; dot product, cross product; matrix operations and determinants

units.title: Statistics: Inference and Regression
units.description: Hypothesis testing, confidence intervals, and linear regression

units.title: Dynamics: Forces in 2D
units.description: Projectile motion, circular motion, centripetal force, and friction

units.title: Gravitation and Orbital Mechanics
units.description: Newton's law of universal gravitation; satellite orbits; escape velocity

units.title: Acids, Bases, and Equilibrium
units.description: pH, Ka and Kb; Le Chatelier's principle; buffer solutions

units.title: Electrochemistry
units.description: Oxidation-reduction reactions; galvanic cells; electrolysis; the Nernst equation

units.title: Evolution, Ecology, and Conservation
units.description: Population dynamics; biodiversity; species interactions; conservation biology

units.title: Advanced Python: Decorators and Generators
units.description: Higher-order functions, closures, iterators, and generator expressions

units.title: Computer Vision Basics
units.description: Image processing with OpenCV; feature detection; convolutional neural networks

units.title: Cloud Computing
units.description: IaaS, PaaS, SaaS; deploying applications; containerization with Docker

units.title: Cryptography
units.description: Symmetric and asymmetric encryption; hash functions; PKI and TLS

units.title: Natural Language Processing
units.description: Tokenization, embeddings, sentiment analysis, and transformer models

units.title: Fluid Mechanics
units.description: Bernoulli's equation, fluid flow, viscosity, and hydraulic systems

units.title: Signal Processing
units.description: Analog and digital signals; Fourier transform; filters and signal conditioning

units.title: Embedded Systems
units.description: Microcontrollers, sensors, actuators, and real-time programming with C/Arduino

units.title: Systems Engineering
units.description: Requirements, architecture, integration, verification, and project management
